CustomField.description: Opens a view where you can send "RTV, Rental, Failed to Make Appointment" emails to ten applicants at a time who did not contact the property manager to set up an appointment to see the unit.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Opens a view where you can send "RTV, Rental, Failed to Make Appointment" emails to ten applicants at a time who did not contact the property manager to set up an appointment to see the unit.
CustomField.label: Send Did Not Make Appointment Emails, R
